candidate_definition_hints.text: The official Open-Asset-Importer-Library Repository. Loads 40+ 3D-file-formats into one unified and clean data structure.

FROM gcc:1.5.1.0 RUN apt-get update \ apt-get install --no-install-recommends -y ninja-build cmake zlib1g-dev WORKDIR /app COPY . . RUN mkdir build && cd build && \ cmake -G 'Ninja' \ -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \ -DASSIMP_BUILD_ASSIMP_TOOLS=ON \ .. && \ ninja -j4 && ninja instal…
